indicator.title: U-5 labor underutilization rate
indicator.notes: Alternative labor underutilization measure U-5; total unemployed plus all marginally attached workers as a percent of the civilian labor force plus all marginally attached workers.

observations.footnotes: Data unavailable due to the 2025 lapse in appropriations.
January 2026 estimates were revised to incorporate updated population controls. For more information, see www.bls.gov/cps/documentation.htm#pop.
